name: CodeParrot
tagline: AI tool to convert Figma designs into production-ready code
description: Y Combinator-backed CodeParrot spent a year pivoting but could never get past $1,500 MRR in the crowded AI coding space.
story: CodeParrot went through Y Combinator's Winter 2023 batch with a tool that used AI to convert Figma designs into production-ready code. The idea was compelling — bridging the gap between design and development was a persistent pain point. But the AI coding assistant market was already crowded with well-funded competitors like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Replit. CodeParrot struggled to differentiate, managing only $1,500 in monthly recurring revenue after a year of pivots. Unable to secure follow-on funding in an increasingly skeptical market, the company shut down in 2025. It was a stark reminder that in the AI coding space, a YC badge alone wasn't enough to survive.
